description: Google Cloud Search is an enterprise search service for Google Workspace that lets organizations search Workspace content and indexed third-party data. Its API supports connector/indexing, schema and data source management, and search/query features.
summary: Google Cloud Search exposes one authenticated REST API at `https://cloudsearch.googleapis.com` for indexing, schema/configuration, and query operations; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
